name: Kronosaurus
tagline: A sea monster bigger than a school bus, with jaws packed with massive, sharp teeth!
intro: Kronosaurus was a giant pliosaur found in Australia. At fifty-six feet long, if this enormous marine reptile could have stood on its tail, it would have been able to peer into the fifth floor of a building! Its huge, gaping mouth was lined with massive, sharp teeth, so it would have been able to tackle most other marine animals with ease. Kronosaurus used its giant paddle-like fins to propel itself through the water.

topics.title: Of Pliosaurs and Plesiosaurs
topics.text: Kronosaurus was a pliosaur like Peloneustes below. Both have large heads and short necks.

captions.label: Snake necks
captions.text: Elasmosaurus was a plesiosaur. Its neck made up more than half of its forty-three foot length.
